articles.title: US stocks today: Nasdaq ends lower with tech slip; investors assess softer jobs data
articles.description: US markets closed mixed as weak June jobs data cooled rate hike fears. Nasdaq fell on tech and chip stock declines, while the Dow rose strongly. Tesla slipped despite strong deliveries. Softer payrolls reduced Fed tightening expectations, offering near-term relief, even as inflation concerns tied to oil prices persisted.

articles.title: Crude Oil Prices Recover as the Dollar Weakens
articles.description: August WTI crude oil (CLQ26 ) on Thursday closed up +0.11 (+0.16%), and August RBOB gasoline (RBQ26 ) closed down -0.0279 (-0.95%). Crude oil and gasoline prices settled mixed on Thursday. Crude oil recovered from a 4.25-month low on Thursday and po...

articles.title: Nat-Gas Prices Retreat as US Storage Levels Build
articles.description: August Nymex natural gas (NGQ26 ) on Thursday closed down -0.024 (-0.75%). Nat-gas prices slid to a 2-week low on Thursday and settled lower after weekly US nat-gas storage rose more than expected. The EIA reported that weekly EIA nat-gas inventorie...

articles.title: California's Fourth of July gas prices see massive increase in 2026
articles.description: Heading into the Fourth of July holiday, California's average gasoline price per gallon is $5.40, up nearly $1 from 2025 when fuel prices were $4.57, according to AAA.

articles.title: California's Fourth of July gas prices see massive increase in 2026
articles.description: Heading into the Fourth of July holiday, California's average gasoline price per gallon is $5.40, up nearly $1 from 2025 when fuel prices were $4.57, according to AAA.

articles.title: Tesla global auto sales jump 25% in 2nd quarter, beating expectations
articles.description: NEW YORK — Tesla reported a jump in second-quarter auto sales Thursday, as Elon Musk's electric vehicle company easily topped expectations in a period of lofty gasoline prices due to the US-Iran war.

articles.title: Market Dynamics: Nascent Jobs Report and Tech Stocks' Slump
articles.description: The Nasdaq and S&P 500 dipped due to a second day of declines in technology stocks, while a lower-than-expected U.S. jobs report eased concerns over potential Federal Reserve interest rate hikes. Semiconductor stocks experienced significant losses. Oil prices fell amid diplomatic progress between Iran and the U.S., impacting markets.

articles.title: Brazil to phase out subsidy for diesel more slowly than for gasoline, minister says
articles.description: Brazil's government will take longer to phase out its diesel subsidy than the gasoline benefit, ‌reflecting concerns the process must be handled carefully, even after the drop in global oil prices, to avoid price shocks or fuel shortages, Planning and Budget Minister Bruno Moretti told Reuters on Thursday.

articles.title: Petrol, diesel prices to fall only after cheaper crude oil reaches Indian refiners: Hardeep Puri
articles.description: Petrol and diesel prices will only decrease after cheaper crude oil reaches Indian refiners, says Petroleum Minister Hardeep Puri.

articles.title: Keir Starmer and Ed Miliband are out of control - anyone with a car should be furious
articles.description: Keir Starmer and Ed Miliband's petrol and diesel car ban plan is out of control - at this point, no one wants it.
